title: SUMMER CAMP - 211info
text: CAMP TAMARACK SUMMER CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a camp with a range of options such as T-shirt printing, ceramics, paddleboarding, snorkeling, sports, and camping. The schedule changes regularly and may include crafts, cooking, archery, scavenger hunts, canoeing, hiking, and water activities. 19696 Sunshine Way Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Ages 8-12 Hours: Camps are 6 days long and run weekly from June through August. Registration opens in January. Email (541) 610-9946 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 610-9946 Person Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to sign up FEES: $750 per week DOCUMENTS: Registration materials AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Camps Outdoor Environmental Education Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CAMP TAMARACK
